title: Part 7 – Passage unique : mise à jour politique de voyage
instructions: Lisez la note de service, puis répondez aux questions.
passage:
To: All Employees
From: Administration Department
Subject: Updated Business Travel Policy — Effective January 1st

Please be aware of the following updates to our business travel policy, effective January 1st:

1. Flight bookings: Economy class is required for all domestic flights. For international flights over eight hours, business class may be requested with prior written approval from the department head.

2. Accommodation: The maximum nightly rate is now set at $180 (previously $150). Breakfast is no longer covered unless included in the room rate.

3. Meal allowance: The daily meal allowance has been increased to $65 per day (from $50).

4. Receipts: All expenses over $25 must be supported by an original receipt. Expenses submitted without receipts will not be reimbursed.

For questions about the updated policy, please contact admin@company.com.

questions.prompt: When does the updated travel policy take effect?
Under what condition may an employee fly business class?
choices: For domestic flights over four hours
For international flights over eight hours with written approval
For flights booked more than two weeks in advance
questions.explanation: "For international flights over eight hours, business class may be requested with prior written approval from the department head".

questions.prompt: What change has been made to the meal allowance?
choices: It has been reduced from $65 to $50
It has been increased from $50 to $65
questions.explanation: "The daily meal allowance has been increased to $65 per day (from $50)".

questions.prompt: What is required for expenses over $25?
questions.explanation: "All expenses over $25 must be supported by an original receipt".
